name_en: Sai-no-Kawara Hall
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a building: the Sai-no-Kawara hall. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1972-04-01. It is located in Iwafune-machi Shizu, Tochigi City.

name_en: Jikaku Daishi Hall
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a building: the hall dedicated to Jikaku Daishi. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1992-04-10. It is located in Iwafune-machi Onodera, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Kōheiji Hondō (Kyakuden) tsuketari Kūden Ikki Kyakuden Munafuda Ichimai Kūden Okifuda Ichimai
name_en: Main Hall (Guest Hall) of Kōheiji Temple, with Shrine Cabinet and Related Tablets
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a building: the main hall (guest hall) of Kōheiji Temple, together with an attached shrine cabinet, a guest-hall ridge tablet, and a shrine-cabinet placard. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2016-03-04. It is located in Iwafune-machi Shimotsubara, Tochigi City.

name_en: Former Tochigi Town Hall Building
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a building: the former Tochigi town hall. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2017-12-28. It is located in Irifune-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Ceiling Painting "Dragon" of the Ōhirasan Shrine Guardian Gate
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting: the ceiling picture of a dragon in the guardian gate of Ōhirasan Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Hirai-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Painting of the Hemp Harvest
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting depicting the hemp harvest. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1964-05-19. It is located at the Tochigi City Museum of Art.

name_en: Painting of the Ancient Tenpyō Temple (Kairyūōji)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting depicting the ancient temple Kairyūōji of the Tenpyō era. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1977-03-17. It is located at the Tochigi City Museum of Art.

name_en: Hanging Scroll of Fudō Myōō
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting: a hanging scroll depicting Fudō Myōō. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-10-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Kō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Ink and Light-Color Landscape Painting on Paper
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting: a landscape rendered in ink and light color on paper. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1989-09-20. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishinoda, Tochigi City.

name_en: Painting of a Half-Seated Pensive Bodhisattva
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting depicting a half-seated pensive (hanka shiyui) image. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1993-03-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Kō, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Tazaki Sōun Shihon Bokuga Tansai "Nōka Danran Zu"
name_en: Tazaki Sōun's "Farmhouse Gathering" in Ink and Light Color on Paper
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting by Tazaki Sōun titled "Farmhouse Gathering" (Nōka Danran Zu), in ink and light color on paper. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2004-09-10. It is located at the Ashikaga Sōun Museum of Art.

name_romaji: Tazaki Sōun Shihon Bokuga Tansai "Shōki no Zu"
name_en: Tazaki Sōun's "Shōki" in Ink and Light Color on Paper
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting by Tazaki Sōun titled "Shōki" (Shōki no Zu), in ink and light color on paper. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2004-09-10. It is located at the Ashikaga Sōun Museum of Art.

name_en: Fukuda Tōin's "Flowers and Birds" in Color on Silk
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting by Fukuda Tōin titled "Flowers and Birds" (Kachō Zu), in color on silk. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2004-09-10. It is located in Nishikata-machi Moto, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Fukuda Tōin Kenpon Chakushoku "Shūei Sansui Zu"
name_en: Fukuda Tōin's "Autumn Landscape" in Color on Silk
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a painting by Fukuda Tōin titled "Autumn Landscape" (Shūei Sansui Zu), in color on silk. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2004-09-10. It is located in Nishikata-machi Moto, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Iwafunesan Jizō Bosatsu Engi (Kana-bon Gokan)・Shimotsukeshū Iwafunesan Engi (Mana-bon Ikkan)
name_en: Origin Legend of Iwafunesan Jizō Bodhisattva, with Related Statues and Objects
description_en: A tangible cultural property, classified under painting: the origin legend of the Iwafunesan Jizō Bodhisattva in a five-volume kana version and a one-volume mana version, together with an attached wooden standing Jizō statue and additional related sculptures and objects. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2015-03-31. It is located in Iwafune-machi Shizu, Tochigi City.

name_en: Yakushi Nyorai (Medicine Buddha)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Yakushi Nyorai, the Medicine Buddha. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Minagawa Jōnai-machi, Tochigi City.

name_en: Carvings of the Onarimon Gate of Jōganji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: the carvings on the Onarimon gate of Jōganji Temple. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Asahi-chō, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Jōjuin Fudōdō no Tobira no Chōkoku
name_en: Door Carvings of the Fudō Hall of Jōjuin Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: the carvings on the doors of the Fudō hall of Jōjuin Temple. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Asahi-chō, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Sankison no Uchi, Chūi Aoki Zō
name_en: Middle Blue Demon Statue of the Three Demon Deities
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: the middle blue-demon statue among the Three Demon Deities. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Asahi-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Statue of Akshobhya Buddha (Shakyamuni Buddha)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Akshobhya (Ashuku) Nyorai, also identified as Shakyamuni Buddha. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1976-07-01. It is located in Hirai-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Daiitoku Yaksha Myōō
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Daiitoku Yaksha Myōō. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1976-07-01. It is located in Hirai-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Manjushri Bodhisattva (Monju)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Manjushri (Monju) Bodhisattva. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1976-07-01. It is located in Hirai-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Statue of Dainichi Nyorai (Mahavairocana)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Dainichi Nyorai (Mahavairocana). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1976-07-01. It is located in Hirai-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Fudō Myōō (Acala)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Fudō Myōō (Acala). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1976-07-01. It is located in Hirai-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Gilt-Bronze Standing Amida Buddha Triad (Zenkōji Type)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a gilt-bronze standing statue of Amida Nyorai with attendant statues, of the Zenkōji type. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1994-10-25. It is located in Hakomori-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Wooden Seated Bodhisattva-Form Statue
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a wooden seated statue in bodhisattva form. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2003-07-24. It is located in Nonaka-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Statue of Prince Shōtoku as a Child
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Prince Shōtoku depicted as a child. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-09-21. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, within the Ōhira History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

name_en: Rekkokushi Statue
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: the Rekkokushi statue. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-09-21. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, within the Ōhira History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

name_en: Statue of Twin Dragons
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of twin dragons (sōryū). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-09-21. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, within the Ōhira History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statues of Shōgun Jizō and Bishamonten
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: wooden standing statues of Shōgun Jizō and Bishamonten. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1989-09-20. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, Tochigi City.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Kangiten
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a wooden standing statue of Kangiten. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1989-09-20. It is located in Ōhira-machi Tomita, Tochigi City.

name_en: "Hundred Poems" Tablet of Suwa Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a tablet inscribed with the "Hundred Poems" (Hyakushu Uta) at Suwa Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1983-03-25. It is located in Ōhira-machi Mayumi, Tochigi City.

name_en: Mountain Gate Tablet of Daichūji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: the tablet of the mountain gate (sanmon) of Daichūji Temple. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1983-03-25. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, Tochigi City.

name_en: Wooden Half-Seated Statue of Jizō Bodhisattva
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a wooden half-seated statue of Jizō Bodhisattva. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1991-11-12. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, Tochigi City.

name_en: Statue of Prince Shōtoku in Filial Devotion
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Prince Shōtoku depicted in filial devotion (kōyō taishi). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-10-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Kō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Seated Statue of Dainichi Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a seated statue of Dainichi Nyorai. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1997-10-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Akama, Tochigi City.

name_en: Seated Buddha Statue
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a seated statue of a Nyorai (Buddha). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2001-10-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Nakane, Tochigi City.

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Batō Kannon Bodhisattva
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a wooden seated statue of Batō Kannon Bodhisattva. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2002-10-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Tsuga, Tochigi City.

name_en: Statue of Yaohi Bikuni
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Yaohi Bikuni. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-03-05. It is located in Nishikata-machi Manako, Tochigi City.

name_en: Standing Statue of Shō Kannon
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a standing statue of Shō Kannon. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1982-06-21. It is located in Nishikata-machi Honjō, Tochigi City.
